data.title: Heirs, Charity, or Burn? The Ongoing Debate Over Crypto After Death
data.description:
The debate over what happens to crypto after death, covering inheritance, charitable donations, and token burning, while emphasizing the importance of early and secure planning to protect digital assets. The post Heirs, Charity, or Burn? The Ongoing Debate Over Crypto After Death first appeared on The Shib Daily.
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/11/28/heirs-charity-or-burn-the-ongoing-debate-over-crypto-after-death/

data.title: Bitcoin Price Prediction Turns Bullish as $160B Reenters Market — Here Is Why a Breakout Toward $100K Is Back on the Table
data.description:
The prediction for Bitcoin's price has taken a positive turn as a substantial influx of $160 billion reenters the cryptocurrency market. This influx is reigniting optimism among investors and analysts alike, suggesting that a significant breakout toward the $100,000 mark is once again a realistic scenario. In this analysis, we will explore the factors contributing to this bullish sentiment, such as the renewed interest from institutional investors, the stability of the underlying technology, and the broader trends in the financial markets that are influencing cryptocurrency valuations.
source: https://blocknews.com/bitcoin-price-prediction-turns-bullish-as-160b-reenters-market-here-is-why-a-breakout-toward-100k-is-back-on-the-table/

data.title: Cardano Proposes New Critical Integrations Budget to Accelerate Network Growth
data.description:
Cardano has taken a major step toward scaling real economic activity on its network, as the Cardano Foundation, Input Output Global, EMURGO, Intersect MBO, and Midnight jointly submitted a governance action for a Critical Integrations Budget.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/cardano-proposes-new-critical-integrations-budget-to-accelerate-network-growth/

data.title: The Upbit hacker launders funds through Railgun, passing the mixer’s proof of innocence
data.description:
The Upbit hacker moved funds through Railgun, passing the mixer's test for banned wallets. The exploiter bypassed the test by quickly moving funds between wallets, so Railgun did not have an updated database of flagged addresses.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/upbit-hacker-launders-funds-through-railgun/

data.title: OpenSea CMO Dismisses Claims of Coinbase Data Leak
data.description:

source: https://coincu.com/news/opensea-cmo-denies-coinbase-leak/

data.title: New Wallet Receives Over 20,000 ETH from BitGo
data.description: According to Foresight News, Onchain Lens has detected that a newly created wallet has received 20,532 ETH from BitGo, valued at approximately $62.85 million. The address is speculated to potentially belong to BitGo.

data.title: Binance's API update to support Chinese language may have influenced the surge in the Meme token, Binance Life, by over 30% in a short period.
data.description: Binance API has been updated to support Chinese. Possibly influenced by this news, GMGN data shows that the meme token, Binance Life, surged by over 30% in a short period.

data.title: Tom Lee's Bitmine bought another 20,532 ETH, worth $63.32 million.
data.description: According to Lookonchain, Bitmine, owned by Tom Lee (@fundstrat), has purchased another 20,532 ETH, worth $63.32 million.
